blocks.text: Cricket update: Sooryavanshi, 15, has 'natural abilities' to shine for India. India batting coach Sitanshu Kotak feels 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has the "natural abilities" to make his mark in international cricket if selected for Friday's T20I against Ireland in Belfast (13:30 BST).
